title: Women Empowerment Workshop
description:
This workshop aimed to provide women with the skills and knowledge needed to become financially independent and raise awareness about their rights.
The session was led by experts in education and legal matters.

title: Health Camp for Rural Communities
description:
A free medical camp offering basic health check-ups and medicines to underserved communities.
Doctors and volunteers provided guidance on hygiene and preventive care.

title: Education for All: School Supplies Drive
description:
PHRO successfully organized a drive to collect and distribute school supplies for children in remote areas.
The goal was to ensure that every child has the tools to succeed in education.

title: Human Rights Awareness Walk
description:
The Human Rights Awareness Walk aimed at raising awareness about human rights issues affecting marginalized communities.
Participants held banners and gave speeches advocating for equal rights for all.

title: Disaster Relief Fundraiser
description: In response to recent floods, PHRO organized a disaster relief fundraiser to provide essential supplies, shelter, and medical aid to those affected.
